name: Troy Norman
quote: I’ve been through multiple iterations of my case studies, but Chip’s feedback was right on the money. They provide a senior-level perspective that focuses on what actually makes a designer valuable to an employer. If you want a review that gives you a push in the right direction and prepares you for real-world interviews, this is it.

name: Kevin Presley
quote: Excellent feedback. Chip doesn't just tell you it looks good; they dive deep into the 'why' behind your design decisions. The combination of their personal expertise and their AI-powered case study reviewer provided me with a clear, actionable roadmap to level up my portfolio for senior roles.

name: Patrick Bruno
quote: Chip has a sharp eye for distinguishing between mid-level and senior-level work. They helped me realize that as a lead, my portfolio needs to go much deeper into the 'why'—focusing on business constraints and unlocking revenue. If you are a senior designer wondering why your portfolio traffic isn't converting into interviews, Chip’s analysis will show you exactly what’s missing.

name: Mustafa Motiwala
role: Product Designer @ University of the Arts London
quote: I connected with Chip for portfolio advice. He provided excellent insights for my current & future work, and I plan to reach out to him again once I have implemented his feedback. Thanks a ton Chip!

name: Yas Mohammed N
role: UX Designer @ HODO Medical Informatic Solution Private Ltd
quote: Chip is an outstanding mentor with very deep subject knowledge. The topics we discussed were highly valuable, and the time I spent with him was extremely worthwhile—it went well beyond 30 minutes, and I didn’t even realize how quickly the time passed. He is super energetic and analyzed my CV thoroughly. Even though he didn’t have any slots available today, he still arranged time for me.
